path: Problem: Return an associated value from a table based on a lookup key, and show a custom message when the key is missing/invalid
Action: INDEX + MATCH for exact-match lookup, wrapped in IFERROR for not-found handling

Observation: MATCH returns the row position of the lookup value within the key column; INDEX uses that position to fetch the corresponding value from the return column; IFERROR catches #N/A (not found) and other errors
